SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 525
April 6, 2005

Clerk Jose Rios Merida
Not Reported.

APPEARANCES:
Steven Solomon, plaintiff/respondent
Attorney Janine Block appears for the defendant/appellant

Action called for Small Claims Trial De Novo on Appeal. Court and parties are present as noted above. Stipulation to Pro Tem Judge signed. Parties sworn, testify. Defendant/appellant exhibits A, B (business records, procedures) marked and admitted. Case argued and submitted.

-----------------------------------------

Later, outside the parties' presence: Judgment is entered in favor of plaintiff/respondent in the amount of $449.99 (principal) and $32.00 (costs.) Judgment signed, filed and copies mailed to parties. Appeal exhibits (only) returned by mail. Certificate of mailing by clerk.
